home.title: Uttara Farm — Prosperity through turmeric and ginger farming in Vidarbha
home.description: A social initiative supporting farmers in Ralegaon and Vidarbha, Maharashtra with turmeric and ginger expertise, soil testing, and access to major markets.

about.title: About — Uttara Farm & Vijay Uttarwar
about.description: Uttara Farm is a social project led by Vijay Uttarwar, founder of Naturell (Max Protein and more), which joined Zydus Wellness in 2024—giving back to villages near Ralegaon.

contact.title: Contact — Uttara Farm
contact.description: Reach Uttara Farm for collaboration, media requests, and strategic conversations.

hero.title: Prosperity for farmers through turmeric and ginger
hero.subtitle: We are starting with turmeric and ginger, both high-yield crops with regular demand, and helping farming families in Ralegaon and Vidarbha grow them with expert guidance, practical tools, and fair access to big-city markets.

mission.title: A social project rooted in local farming
mission.p1: Agriculture is the backbone of our region. Uttara Farm exists to help farmers build economic stability from the land they already know—without having to leave it behind.
mission.p2: By starting with high-yield crops like turmeric and ginger and surrounding farmers with training, testing, and market connections, we aim to turn local farming into a more resilient livelihood.

ginger.title: Why turmeric and ginger
ginger.lead: Turmeric and ginger can both deliver strong returns and regular market demand, but they are management-intensive crops that need disciplined execution.
ginger.p1: These crops require careful season-long attention: land preparation, seed quality, nutrition, irrigation, and disease management all matter. That is why going it alone is risky.
ginger.p2: Our programme reduces that risk by pairing farmers with experienced crop advisors, soil insight, and a clearer path from field to buyers in larger cities.

knowledge.title: Knowledge & field guidance
knowledge.body: Hands-on training and season-long advice from turmeric and ginger consultants—including specialists like Nilesh—so practices match local soil and weather.

infrastructure.title: Tools & soil insight
infrastructure.body: Access to soil testing kits and support through Warkem, helping farmers understand their land before they plant and adjust nutrition responsibly.

markets.title: Scale, logistics & markets
markets.body: Working toward better bundling, grading, and transport so produce can reach tier-1 markets such as Mumbai—capturing economies of scale small lots often miss.

region.title: Ralegaon & Vidarbha
region.p1: We work in Ralegaon and the wider Vidarbha region of Maharashtra—communities where farming shapes daily life and seasonal income.
region.p2: Our effort is deliberately local: solutions should fit Vidarbha’s climate, soils, and the realities of family farms.

partners.title: Partners & contributors
partners.body: Uttara Farm brings together field experts, soil-testing partners, and market allies. Names and logos here recognise those who make the programme possible.
partners.nilesh: Turmeric and ginger consultants — e.g. Nilesh
partners.warkemImageAlt: Warkem BioAgri logo from their official website

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Farmers, cooperatives, and supporters can reach Vijay directly about Uttara Farm.

contactPage.title: Contact Uttara Farm
contactPage.lead: For speaking requests, collaborations, media questions, or strategic conversations, reach out directly.

footer.rights: Uttara Farm. Supporting farmers in Ralegaon and Vidarbha.

aboutPage.title: From Bhamb to building Naturell, and back to Bhamb
aboutPage.lead: This page tells one connected story: Vijay Uttarwar grew up in Bhamb, built Naturell into a nationally recognized nutrition business, and is now using that success to give back through Uttara Farm.
aboutPage.p1: Vijay’s roots are in Bhamb, near Ralegaon in Vidarbha. The realities of village farming shaped his worldview long before entrepreneurial success.
aboutPage.p2: Through Naturell, RiteBite, and Max Protein, he built brands that scaled across India and eventually became part of the 2024 Zydus Wellness transaction.
aboutPage.p3: That journey created not just financial outcomes but operating experience, networks, and execution capability at scale.
aboutPage.p4: Uttara Farm is the return journey: applying those learnings to improve farmer livelihoods in and around the same villages he comes from.
aboutPage.logosIntro: A dedicated space for Uttara Farm identity assets, with room for additional local logos in future.
aboutPage.logoMainCaption: Uttara Farms logo — primary website identity
aboutPage.storyIntro: The journey spans Vijay Uttarwar’s entrepreneurial path: Naturell, RiteBite, Max Protein, and the 2024 sale to Zydus Wellness.

gallery.intro: Every image from the website asset library is available below. Use tabs to switch between images already in the story and additional assets such as logos.

gallery.extraRitebiteBody: Additional RiteBite image from the asset library that is now reintegrated on site.

story.naturellTitle: Vijay Uttarwar and the formation of Naturell
story.naturellBody: Naturell was formed to build modern nutrition products for Indian consumers, laying the entrepreneurial foundation that now powers Uttara Farm’s social mission.
story.ritebiteTitle: Stugar launches as a Stevia sweetening milestone
story.ritebiteBody: Naturell first built Stugar around Stevia as a separate sweetener-focused effort. RiteBite came afterward as a distinct next chapter in everyday nutrition snacking.
story.maxProteinTitle: Creation of the Max Protein brand
story.maxProteinBody: The Max Protein line expanded the portfolio into mainstream protein-rich snacks and became one of the most visible outcomes of the Naturell journey.
story.scaleBody: RiteBite and Max Protein scaled across categories and channels, proving that Indian nutrition brands could combine health positioning with mass-market appeal.
story.zydusBody: In 2024, Naturell was sold to Zydus Wellness, marking a major milestone and enabling Vijay to channel experience and networks back into village-focused initiatives.

timeline.title: Full Story Timeline
timeline.intro: The complete arc of Vijay Uttarwar's journey shown as a circular narrative: every milestone feeds the next and ultimately loops back to village impact.
timeline.centerLabel: Journey loops back to rural impact

roots.title: Bhamb roots and a bigger dream
roots.detail: Vijay grew up in Bhamb near Ralegaon, where farming shaped everyday life. That early exposure stayed with him while he built his professional career.

naturellBegins.title: Naturell begins with a health-first mission
naturellBegins.detail: Naturell started with the vision of combining healthier food products with long-term value creation.

pivot.title: Setback, pivot, and product learning
pivot.detail: After early regulatory challenges, the team pivoted into nutrition snacks and steadily improved product fit, positioning, and category understanding.

scale.title: RiteBite and Max Protein scale nationally
scale.detail: Focused innovation, wider distribution, and clear consumer use-cases helped build RiteBite and Max Protein into widely recognized brands.

zydus.title: Naturell joins Zydus Wellness
zydus.detail: The 2024 transaction with Zydus Wellness marked a major milestone and validated years of brand-building and execution.

impact.title: Success circles back to village impact
impact.detail: With the Naturell journey at scale, Vijay turned his attention to giving back to Bhamb, Ralegaon, and nearby farming communities through Uttara Farm.

impact.title: Impact of the Journey
impact.intro: This story is not only about one founder. It shows how a successful business journey can create value for many groups and then return that value to the village ecosystem.

people.title: People and teams
people.p1: Employees and contributors participated in value creation as the company scaled.
people.p2: A continuity-focused approach protected long-term careers and capability building.

investors.title: Investors and shareholders
investors.p1: The growth journey created meaningful outcomes for early risk capital.
investors.p2: Execution discipline and category expansion translated into durable enterprise value.

ecosystem.title: Strategic ecosystem
ecosystem.p1: The Zydus partnership enabled the brands to move onto a larger national platform.
ecosystem.p2: Suppliers, channel partners, and stakeholders benefited from a stronger scaled network.

villages.title: Village communities in Vidarbha
villages.p1: Experience and networks from this entrepreneurial journey now feed back into rural initiatives.
villages.p2: Uttara Farm is designed to convert private success into public rural opportunity.
